texto: The focus of the entrepreneur must always be on exchanging products or services for money, and anything that distracts from that like actually running a business, should be avoided where possible.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a John Winterson Richards: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a negocios. O trecho “The focus of the entrepreneur must always be on exchanging products or services for money, and an…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que negocios, business, entrepreneur pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de entrepreneur.
